name: TUL Corporation
summary: TUL Corporation develops and markets hardware solutions in IT industry worldwide. The company offers gaming and embedded graphics cards, SoC based mainboards and systems, FPGA products, thunderbolt adopters, and SSD storage solutions. It serves OEMs, distributors, VARs, and system integrators. The company was formerly known as C.P. Technologies and changed its name to TUL Corporation in March 2004. TUL Corporation was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
